scripts.build:purge:css: purgecss --css assets/css/main.css --content index.html blog.html careers.html legal.html "assets/js/*.js" --output assets/css/ --safelist lang-tr lang-en hidden active sticky stat-satisfaction-en stat-satisfaction-tr
scripts.build:minify:js: terser assets/js/language.js -o assets/js/language.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/translations.js -o assets/js/translations.min.js -c -m
